meta.title: Get More Customers — Without the Confusion
meta.description: We help local businesses get a steady flow of new customers from the internet — without you learning anything technical. We handle everything. Book a free 20-minute call.

hero.subheadline: We help local businesses like yours get a steady flow of new customers from the internet — without you needing to learn anything technical. We handle everything.
hero.trust: No obligation. No tech talk. Just a simple conversation about your business.

problem.title: Does any of this sound familiar?

items.pain: You're great at what you do — but new customers are hard to find.
items.note: We've heard this hundreds of times. It's not your fault.

items.pain: You have no idea where to start with the internet.
items.note: That's normal — nobody is born knowing this stuff.

items.pain: You tried ads before and just burned money.
items.note: Usually the problem wasn't you — it was who set them up.

items.pain: Your competitors seem to be everywhere online, and you're not.
items.note: That's easier to change than you think.

items.pain: You don't have time to learn all this — you have a business to run.
items.note: Exactly why we handle every part of it for you.

problem.empathy: We've heard this hundreds of times. It's not your fault — most agencies make this way too complicated.

steps.title: Here's what we actually do for you
steps.intro: Four simple steps. We handle every one — you just answer the phone.

items.title: We build your website
items.desc: A professional website that actually works — not just looks pretty.

items.title: We bring you traffic
items.desc: We run ads on Facebook, Instagram, and Google so people find you.

items.title: We capture interest
items.desc: We catch every interested person and check they're ready to buy.

items.title: We deliver leads
items.desc: Real people, ready to become your customers — straight to your phone.

testimonials.quote: I'd tried ads before and just threw money away. With New Age my phone hasn't stopped in two months.
testimonials.name: James

testimonials.quote: I don't understand the internet and I don't want to. They handle everything — I just answer the phone.
testimonials.name: Sofia

testimonials.quote: For the first time I can see exactly where my customers come from. Clear, simple, and it works.
testimonials.name: George

services.title: What's included — plain and simple

items.title: Your website
items.desc: A professional website that works on mobile and loads fast.

items.title: Your ads
items.desc: We create and run ads that bring people to you (Facebook + Google).

items.title: Lead capture
items.desc: A smart form and phone system that catches every interested person.

items.title: Lead delivery
items.desc: We send you ready-to-talk customers directly to your phone.

items.title: Monthly report
items.desc: A simple report showing exactly what you're getting for your money.

services.note: Starting from less than the price of a single new customer — and most clients earn back their investment in the first 30 days. Let's build a plan that fits your budget.

leadSection.title: Start getting more customers
leadSection.subtitle: Book a free 20-minute call. We'll look at your business and show you a simple plan to get more customers — no jargon, no pressure.
bullets: No tech talk — just plain language
A clear plan you can act on right away

finalCta.title: More customers start with one simple conversation
finalCta.subtitle: No obligation. No tech talk. Just a friendly chat about your business and how to grow it.
finalCta.microcopy: We reply fast — usually the same day.
